input.subject: Appointment Reminder for Max
input.snippet: Reminder: Max has an upcoming appointment...
input.body_text:
🐕 APPOINTMENT REMINDER

Hello!

This is a reminder that Max has an upcoming appointment:

Pet: Max (Golden Retriever)
Owner: Jennifer Walsh

Appointment Type: Annual Wellness Exam & Vaccinations
Date: Friday, February 20, 2026
Time: 9:15 AM
Doctor: Dr. Sarah Mitchell, DVM

Happy Paws Veterinary Clinic
2200 Pet Care Lane
Mountain View, CA 94043
Phone: (650) 555-PAWS

Please bring:
- Vaccination records (if from another vet)
- Stool sample (if possible)
- List of any concerns

Need to reschedule? Call us or reply to this email.

We look forward to seeing Max!

Happy Paws Team 🐾
